project.name: predictive-maintenance-platform
project.description: Industrial equipment alert and maintenance workflow platform.

requirements.statement: The system shall ingest equipment alert events from Kafka.
Authorized users shall confirm, assign, and close an alert.

acceptance_criteria.statement: Given a valid Kafka alert event, the platform persists one alert and acknowledges the message only after persistence succeeds.

constraints.statement: Backend implementation uses Java and PostgreSQL.

assumptions.statement: OIDC-compatible identity provider will be available.

quality_attributes.name: observability
quality_attributes.scenario: Operations staff inspect ingestion failures in staging and production.
quality_attributes.measure: Each failed message exposes a trace identifier, structured error, retry count, and dead-letter outcome.

open_questions.question: Which identity provider will be used?
